violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by equipment. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025
Cheese was observed in the walk in cooler past date of disposition. Cheese was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
